name: Wemberly Hills Golf Course
about: Wemberly Hills Golf Course is a public 9-hole course located in Scott Township, PA, featuring both outdoor play and an indoor golf simulator powered by Trackman technology. The facility offers a 2,500 sq ft clubhouse with a pro shop, restaurant, and outdoor patio overlooking the ninth green. It operates as a "hidden gem" in Northeast Pennsylvania, providing golf entertainment for all ages and skill levels with a mix of traditional outdoor rounds and simulator sessions.
why_golfers_like_it: Indoor Trackman simulator for year-round play regardless of weather
Affordable pricing with punch cards and flexible memberships
Welcoming atmosphere suitable for all skill levels, including families
Convenient location near Scranton with full clubhouse amenities

food_and_drink.notes: On-site restaurant with full kitchen service
Fully stocked bar and grill available on premises

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art simulator technology for ball flight analysis

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players should bring their own clubs for simulator sessions, though rentals may be available upon request.

faq.question: Can I bring outside food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not permitted as the venue has its own restaurant and bar on premises.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulator session take?
faq.answer: A typical 18-hole simulator session takes approximately 1-2 hours depending on group size and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Wemberly Hills is family-friendly with welcoming staff and activities suitable for golfers of all ages, including junior memberships available.
